homePage.article-created: A new article has been created.
homePage.narrow-screen: Desktop only for now — mobile support is on the way.
homePage.delete-section: The section is not empty. Do you want to delete it?
homePage.no-saved-articles: <0>No ingredients saved yet.</0> Write an ingredient and press <1 /> to save it.
homePage.article-name-changed: The ingredient name has changed. What would you like to do?

tooltip.help-mode-activated: <0>Help mode enabled!</0> Hover over the main elements to see what each one does. Press the help button again to exit.
tooltip.total-calories: Here you can see your accumulated calories. To know how many you have left, set a calorie goal from the main menu.
tooltip.remaining-calories: Here you can see your remaining calories (calorie goal - accumulated calories).
tooltip.clean-table: Clears the table. Your saved ingredients are not deleted and you can reuse them in your next plan.
tooltip.drag-rows: Drag to reorder as you like.
tooltip.delete-entry: Deletes this row. If the section is collapsed, all its ingredients will be deleted too.
tooltip.delete-section: Deletes this section. If it is collapsed, all its ingredients will be deleted too.
tooltip.add-ingredient: Adds an ingredient right below this row.
tooltip.add-section: Adds a section right below this row.
tooltip.kcal-per-section: Here you can see this section's accumulated calorie total.
tooltip.discard-entry: Excludes this entry from the total calculation without deleting it. Ideal for testing variations.
tooltip.write-or-select-ingredient: Type or select an ingredient from the list.
tooltip.search-ingredient: Search for the ingredient on FatSecret (opens in a new tab).
tooltip.enter-calories: Enter the product's calories. You can find them on the package or search for them on FatSecret.
tooltip.select-entry-type: Indicate what the calories refer to: per 100 g or per serving.
tooltip.entry-quantity: Enter the quantity. If you chose kcal/serving, it is multiplied directly (e.g., 90 x 2). If you chose kcal/100 g, the calculation is adjusted per 100 g.
tooltip.save-ingredient: Save this ingredient with its data (kcal, type, and quantity) to reuse it later from the list.
tooltip.enter-section: Create a section to group ingredients, such as "Breakfast", "Lunch", "Dinner", etc.
